reasoning: Avatar 3 (Avatar: Fire and Ash) is scheduled for release on December 19, 2025. This leaves it a maximum of 13 days (Dec 19 - Dec 31) to accumulate box office within the 2025 calendar year. Currently, mock data for 2025 shows 'A Minecraft Movie' holding the top spot with approximately $424 million in domestic gross. By comparison, Avatar 2 released on Dec 16, 2022 (giving it 16 days in the 2022 calendar year) and accumulated roughly $401M by Dec 31st, 2022. During its first 13 days, Avatar 2 grossed around $337 million. For Avatar 3 to take the top spot in 2025, it would have to open substantially higher than Avatar 2's $134M (closer to $170M+), and hold exceptionally well through the holidays, just to edge past the current $424M high mark. Given the known back-loaded box-office performance trajectory of the Avatar series and the tight 13-day window in the calendar year, it is highly improbable for Avatar 3 to become the highest-grossing 2025 release by calendar gross alone. The market estimate of 0.08 reflects a longshot bias, but I place the probability closer to 4% due to the hard math of daily grossing limits.
